chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-202 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Hamza Noor s/o Muhammad Rafique Through Mr.Shahzad Ahmed Narejo, Advocate Respondent No.1: Mst.Iqra Channa d/o Moosa Channa Through Mr. Shoaib Ali Narejo, Advocate Respondent No.2: District Judge, Jamshoro at Kotri. Nemo Date of hearing: 27.10.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above- titled petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
